# uikit.studio

> A curated gallery of runnable, **agent-ready** UI kits. Point any AI agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) at a kit URL and it can reproduce that exact design.

Paste into your agent: *“build me a website with this design: https://uikit.studio/kit/<id>”*. Each kit exposes a full design spec and a machine manifest.

## Kits
- [Admax](https://uikit.studio/kit/admax/llms.txt): Flat ads campaign manager admin kit. Spec: https://uikit.studio/kit/admax/llms.txt · Manifest: https://uikit.studio/kit/admax/manifest.json · Repo: https://github.com/KernelCode/admax-uikit
- [Aurora](https://uikit.studio/kit/aurora/llms.txt): Glassy SaaS dashboard kit. Spec: https://uikit.studio/kit/aurora/llms.txt · Manifest: https://uikit.studio/kit/aurora/manifest.json · Repo: https://github.com/uikit-studio/aurora-uikit
- [Lime](https://uikit.studio/kit/lime/llms.txt): Limey digital-card kit. Spec: https://uikit.studio/kit/lime/llms.txt · Manifest: https://uikit.studio/kit/lime/manifest.json · Repo: https://github.com/KernelCode/lime-uikit
- [Sada](https://uikit.studio/kit/sada/llms.txt): Editorial audio & video media kit. Spec: https://uikit.studio/kit/sada/llms.txt · Manifest: https://uikit.studio/kit/sada/manifest.json · Repo: https://github.com/KernelCode/sada-uikit
- [Spark](https://uikit.studio/kit/spark/llms.txt): Bold marketing & landing kit. Spec: https://uikit.studio/kit/spark/llms.txt · Manifest: https://uikit.studio/kit/spark/manifest.json · Repo: https://github.com/uikit-studio/spark-uikit
- [Verdant](https://uikit.studio/kit/verdant/llms.txt): Premium furniture storefront kit. Spec: https://uikit.studio/kit/verdant/llms.txt · Manifest: https://uikit.studio/kit/verdant/manifest.json · Repo: https://github.com/KernelCode/verdant-uikit

## Full
- [llms-full.txt](https://uikit.studio/llms-full.txt): every kit's design brief in one file.
